context: Tests whether the agent uses archive-file type with version pinning, checksum verification, platform conditionals, .tmpl suffix, and a github-releases Renovate rule for a cross-platform binary external.

checklist.name: archive-file type
checklist.description: Uses `type = "archive-file"` in the TOML definition (not type=file, archive, or git-repo)

checklist.name: path field present
checklist.description: External definition includes a `path` field specifying the binary name within the archive (e.g. `path = "zellij"`)

checklist.name: Pinned version tag
checklist.description: URL contains a specific version tag (e.g. v0.40.0), NOT 'latest' or a mutable reference

checklist.name: Checksum field
checklist.description: Includes `checksum = "sha256:..."` field (or acknowledges it must be computed)

checklist.name: .tmpl file suffix
checklist.description: The proposed file path ends with .toml.tmpl (not just .toml), enabling Go template processing

checklist.name: Platform conditionals
checklist.description: TOML uses Go template OS conditionals ({{ if eq .chezmoi.os "darwin" }} / linux branch) or architecture variable (.chezmoi.arch)

checklist.name: File in .chezmoiexternals/
checklist.description: Proposes home/.chezmoiexternals/zellij.externals.toml.tmpl (or similar program-specific name), NOT home/.chezmoiexternal.toml

checklist.name: chezmoi diff step
checklist.description: Proposal includes `chezmoi diff` as a verification step
